name: StonkBroker
description: StonkBrokers is an Anvil NFTFi market on Robinhood Chain: a fixed-supply 4,444 ERC-721 collection with an NFT AMM and NFT-backed loans. $STONKBROKER is the collection ERC-20 used to buy and sell brokers; ETH trade and borrow fees fund tokenized stock dividends for activated broker wallets.
